nasb.text: So he set it before them, and they ate and had some left over, according to the word of the Lord.

esv.text: So he set it before them. And they ate and had some left, according to the word of the Lord.

cnv.text: 於是僕人擺在眾人面前，他們都吃，而且還有剩下的，正如耶和華所說的。

ccb.text: 于是，仆人将食物摆在众人面前，他们都吃饱了，果然还有剩余，正如耶和华所言。
